title: Breast pump arrangement
abstract: A breast pump arrangement having an expression kit with a milk flow sensor (200) is provided. The milk flow sensor (200) comprises a container (240) with a first end with a first opening (242) and a second end with a second opening (243). The second opening (243) allows an outflow of milk with a predefined outflow characteristics out of the container (241). The first opening (242) is larger than the second opening (243). A milk amount sensor (250) is provided to measure a height or volume of milk in the container. A calculating unit (260, 240) calculates a milk flow based on the height or volume measurements and the predefined outflow characteristic of the second opening (243).
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: 1. Breast pump arrangement, comprising at least one expression kit (100) having a milk flow sensor (200), wherein the milk flow sensor (200) comprises: a container (240) with a first end (210) with a first opening (242) and a second end (220) with a second opening (243), wherein the first end (210) of the container (240) is configured to receive expressed milk (M), wherein the second opening (243) is configured to allow an outflow of milk (M) with a predefined outflow characteristics from inside the container (241), wherein the first opening (242) is larger than the second opening (243), a milk-amount sensor (250) configured to measure a height or volume of milk (M) in the container (240), and a calculating unit (260, 440) configured to calculate a milk flow based on the height or volume measurements of the milk amount sensor (250) and the predefined outflow characteristic of the second opening (243). 2. Breast pump arrangement according to claim 1, wherein the container (240) is rigid. 3. Breast pump arrangement according to claim 1, wherein the milk-amount sensor (250) is embodied as a capacitive sensor. 4. Breast pump arrangement according to claim 1, wherein the milk-amount sensor (250) is embodied as a resistive sensor. 5. Breast pump arrangement according to claim 1, wherein the milk-amount sensor (250) is embodied as an optical sensor. 6. Breast pump arrangement according to claim 1, further comprising a pump unit (400) having a vacuum pump (440), said pump unit (400 is coupled via a vacuum conduit (410) to the expression kit (100) in order to create a vacuum in the expression kit (100) to allow an expression of milk (M), wherein the pump unit (400) further comprises a control 

 unit (440) which is adapted to control the operation of the vacuum pump (440) to set vacuum settings at the expression kit (100) depending on the determined milk flow. 7. Breast pump arrangement according to claim 6, wherein the control unit (440) is adapted to change the operation of the vacuum pump (440) if a milk flow threshold is exceeded or if the milk flow is below the threshold. 8. Breast pump arrangement according to claim 6, further comprising an electrical line (420) coupling the milk flow sensor (200) with the pump unit (400). 9. Breast pump arrangement according to claim 7, wherein the pump unit (400) further comprises a wireless transceiver (450) configured for wirelessly transmitting a determined milk flow. 10. Breast pump arrangement according to claim 1, wherein the calculating unit (260, 440) calculates the milk flow (V dot ) by using following equation: V dot = C c *Cv*A ape r t ur e *sqrt(2*9.8 l *h) wherein V dot is the volume flow of milk (M), wherein A ape r t ur e is an area of the second opening (243), wherein C c is a contraction coefficient of the second opening (243) and C v is a velocity coefficient of the milk (M), wherein h is a height of the milk (M) inside the container (240).
